_layout_notes: A&B Cat Broker_Apr26 — main grid, 4-row header (R0 segment / R1 make sub-bucket / R2 age tier / R3 rate type), 8 broker zones (East 1..West 2) × ~50 state/city rows × 80 rate columns. Engine: sbi_grouped (column spec hardcoded in parsers/engines/sbi-grouped.js).
PVT car SATP-Apr26 — wide-matrix State+Cluster×Fuel×CC, sheet 1. Engine: sbi_pvt_satp.
Cluster Master — RTO→cluster lookup (older, eff 2 Apr). Engine: rto_mapping.
RTO Master 27th April file — newer cluster master, uploaded as a separate rate card with effective_from=27 Apr so resolveRTO picks by date.
